recommendations.title: The Getaway
recommendations.overview: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

recommendations.title: Harry Brown
recommendations.overview: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

recommendations.title: BIA: An Upside Down World
recommendations.overview: In this alternate world, Bia and Manuel will have a tempestuous relationship. Pixie, the hateful and stunning owner of Laix, decides to buy the Fundom. The great conflict erupts when Pixie announces a concert. This will have Bia and Helena, who in th

recommendations.title: Brooklyn
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Ireland and New York, young Eilis Lacey has to choose between two men and two countries.

recommendations.title: M.F.A.
recommendations.overview: After the accidental death of her rapist, an art student becomes an unlikely vigilante, set out to avenge college girls whose rapists were not charged.

recommendations.title: White Heat
recommendations.overview: A psychopathic criminal with a mother complex makes a daring break from prison and then leads his old gang in a chemical plant payroll heist. After the heist, events take a crazy turn.

recommendations.title: Gunday
recommendations.overview: The lives of Calcutta's most powerful gangsters - Bikram and Bala, changes when Nandita enters it. Then a counter-force takes charge and a thriller unfolds.

recommendations.title: Super Deluxe
recommendations.overview: An unfaithful newly-wed wife, an estranged parent, a priest and an angry son suddenly find themselves in the most unexpected predicaments, each poised to experience their destiny, all on one fateful day.

recommendations.title: A Better Tomorrow II
recommendations.overview: A restauranteur teams up with a police officer and his ex-con brother to avenge the death of a friend's daughter.
